import React from 'react'; export default function Home() { return (

Welcome to Fun and Games!!

We can play together!!

This website is used for VERY bored kids ONLY!!

Here are our games:

  1. Hang man 🙍‍♂️
  2. Tic tac toe ❌⭕
  3. Picture or GIF puzzle game 🧩
  4. Sound board🎶
  5. Fun cat pictures game 😸
  6. What song matches your age?🎵

About
